Definition: Definitions, vocabulary, 'what is X', overview/intro, single-step procedures.
Examples: Glossary terms; 'What is generative AI'; Zero-shot prompt definition

Definition: Applying concepts, multi-step processes, comparing/contrasting, examples and scenarios.
Examples: Few-shot prompting; identifying hallucinations; using a framework

Definition: Synthesis, edge cases, troubleshooting, design decisions, evaluation, content explicitly flagged advanced.
Examples: RACCCA evaluation; agent risk controls; redesigning assessments
